cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Dark = Special in Gen 1-3
cases.note: Crunch is Special in Gen 3 (Dark type). Gen 4 introduced per-move categories, making Crunch Physical.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Ghost = Physical in Gen 1-3
cases.note: Shadow Ball is Physical in Gen 3 (Ghost type). Gen 4 changed it to Special.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Fire = Special
cases.note: Flamethrower is Special in Gen 3 (Fire type). Unchanged in Gen 4+.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Ground = Physical
cases.note: Earthquake is Physical in Gen 3 (Ground type). Unchanged in Gen 4+.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Dark = Special in Gen 1-3
cases.note: Pursuit is Special in Gen 3 (Dark type, type-based split). Became Physical in Gen 4.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Dark = Special in Gen 1-3
cases.note: Knock Off is Special in Gen 3 (Dark type, type-based split). Base power 20, no item boost (that was Gen 6).

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Electric = Special
cases.note: Thunderbolt is Special in Gen 3 (Electric type). Unchanged in Gen 4+.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Normal = Physical
cases.note: Body Slam is Physical in Gen 3 (Normal type, type-based split).

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Ice = Special
cases.note: Ice Beam is Special in Gen 3 (Ice type). Unchanged in Gen 4+.

cases.source: pret/pokeemerald src/data/battle/moves_info.c — type-based split: Dragon = Special
cases.note: Dragon Claw is Special in Gen 3 (Dragon type, type-based split). Became Physical in Gen 4.
Knock Off base power = 20 in Gen 3. The 1.5x damage boost when target holds an item was introduced in Gen 6 (ERRATA #25).
Flamethrower base power = 95 in Gen 3. Reduced to 90 in Gen 6.
Surf base power = 95 in Gen 3. Reduced to 90 in Gen 6.
Thunderbolt base power = 95 in Gen 3. Reduced to 90 in Gen 6.
Aerial Ace base power = 60 in Gen 3. Unchanged in all later gens.
Dragon Claw base power = 80 in Gen 3. Unchanged in later gens.
Extreme Speed has +1 priority in Gen 3. Gen 5 raised it to +2 (ERRATA #7).
Protect has +3 priority in Gen 3 (same as Gen 2 cartridge).
Quick Attack has +1 priority in Gen 3 (Gen 2 cartridge used +2 in 1-based scale).
Mach Punch has +1 priority in Gen 3.
Counter has -5 priority in Gen 3. Mirror Coat also uses -5.
Mirror Coat has -5 priority in Gen 3.

Electric attacking Steel is neutral (1x) in Gen 3. The gTypeEffectiveness[] table in src/battle_main.c has no TYPE_ELECTRIC,TYPE_STEEL entry, meaning neutral. Water/Electric resistance against Steel was introduced in Gen 4.

Water attacking Steel is neutral (1x) in Gen 3. The gTypeEffectiveness[] table in src/battle_main.c has no TYPE_WATER,TYPE_STEEL entry, meaning neutral. Water/Electric resistance against Steel was introduced in Gen 4.
Ghost is 2x super-effective vs Psychic in Gen 3 (Gen 1 bug was fixed in Gen 2).
Fire is super-effective vs Steel (2x) in Gen 3.
Ground is super-effective vs Steel (2x) in Gen 3.
Psychic moves have no effect on Dark-type Pokemon (0x) in Gen 3.
Fighting is super-effective vs Dark (2x) in Gen 3.
Bug is super-effective vs Dark (2x) in Gen 3.
Normal moves have no effect on Ghost-type Pokemon (0x) in Gen 3.
Rock is super-effective vs Flying (2x) in Gen 3.
Endure has +3 priority in Gen 3 per pokeemerald. @pkmn/data reports +4 (Showdown approximation). Pret wins.
